channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal: Team news and standings ahead of crucial Premier League title clash
item.description: Arsenal travel to the Etihad Stadium to face Manchester City in what could prove to be a decisive match in the 2025-26 Premier League title race. Arsenal currently sit six points clear at the top of t...

item.title: Union Bank launches alpher to serve Nigeria's informal economy and boost financial inclusion
item.description: This article highlights the gap between traditional Nigerian banking and the real economy wey plenty people dey operate inside. One side na the formal economy of salary workers, corporate people and d...

item.title: Trump announces second round of US-Iran talks in Islamabad amid ongoing tensions
item.description: Islamabad is preparing to host the second round of direct talks between the United States and Iran as President Donald Trump announced that American representatives are heading to the Pakistani capita...

item.title: Tragic Blast at Virudhunagar Firecracker Unit Claims 20 Lives, CM Stalin Orders Immediate Rescue
item.description: In a heartbreaking incident on Sunday, 19th April 2026, at least 20 workers including several women lost their lives after a powerful explosion occurred at a firecracker manufacturing unit in Kattanar...

item.title: Welsh Actor Gerran Howell Discusses Medical Accuracy and Intense Training for Role in HBO Drama The Pitt
item.description: Welsh actor Gerran Howell, who portrays fourth-year medical student Dennis Whitaker in the popular HBO medical drama The Pitt, has gained a newfound respect for the medical profession after participat...

item.title: US and Iran Report Some Progress in Nuclear Talks Amid Ongoing Tensions in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: In the latest developments, Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf has stated that recent discussions with the United States have achieved some progress, although significant gaps still exist re...

item.title: Daniel Kehlmann’s ‘The Director’ explores filmmaker GW Pabst’s compromises under Nazi regime
item.description: Daniel Kehlmann’s novel ‘The Director’, first published in German as ‘Lichtspiel’ in 2023 and translated into English by Ross Benjamin, has been shortlisted for the 2026 International Booker Prize. Th...

item.title: How external pressure often leads to internal political consolidation: Insights from Iran, Somaliland and South Africa
item.description: In this opinion piece, Dr Joan Swart explores how external pressures, whether military or diplomatic, frequently result in the consolidation of internal political systems rather than the weakening or ...

item.title: Study reveals what stops South African SMEs from adopting green practices
item.description: Small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) form 98 percent of all businesses in South Africa, numbering between 2.4 million and 3.5 million. They create about 66 percent of jobs and support local econo...

item.title: Marco Silva Gives Update on Alex Iwobi Muscular Issue After Brentford Draw
item.description: Na so the matter be for Premier League as Fulham coach Marco Silva don talk about the injury wey Alex Iwobi pick during their match against Brentford for Gtech Community Stadium. The game wey start ti...

item.title: Starmer faces pressure after Mandelson appointment controversy over failed security vetting
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is facing mounting political pressure following revelations that Lord Peter Mandelson was appointed as the UK’s ambassador to the United States despite failing a key se...

item.title: Federal Judge Issues Preliminary Injunction Halting Nexstar Acquisition of Tegna
item.description: A federal judge in California has blocked the proposed merger between Nexstar Media Group and Tegna Inc., two of the largest owners of local television stations in the United States. In a ruling issue...

item.title: Two Tangkhul Naga men killed in armed attack on highway in Ukhrul district of Manipur, state government hands over case to NIA
item.description: In a tragic incident in Manipur’s Ukhrul district, two men from the Tangkhul Naga community lost their lives after unidentified gunmen fired at civilian vehicles travelling along NH202 near Litan area...

item.title: Analysis of Romuald Wadagni's landslide victory in Benin's 2026 presidential election and its implications for the political system
item.description: The presidential election held on 12 April 2026 in Benin saw Romuald Wadagni, the candidate from the presidential majority, win with a massive 94.27 percent of the votes, together with his running mat...

item.title: UST Implements Remote Work Every Monday for Energy Conservation
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) in Manila has announced the start of a remote work arrangement for most of its administrative offices every Monday beginning April 20, 2026. This move forms part of...

item.title: Russia proposes role in removing Iran’s enriched uranium as nuclear negotiations continue
item.description: Russia has shown readiness to support international efforts aimed at reducing tensions over Iran’s nuclear programme by offering to help remove enriched uranium from the country. According to statemen...

item.title: Alitan sa parking sa Intramuros, nauwi sa pisikalan ng e-trike driver at guwardiya
item.description: Nagkaroon ng komprontasyon na nauwi sa pisikalan sa pagitan ng isang e-trike driver at isang guwardiya o tinukoy bilang 'guardia civil' sa loob ng Intramuros, Maynila. Ayon sa ulat, nagsimula ang insi...

item.title: Fort St. John bull rider Jake Gardner takes top spot in PRCA world standings after RodeoHouston win
item.description: Jake Gardner, a bull rider with roots in Fort St. John, British Columbia, has risen to the number one position in the Professional Rodeo Cowboys Association (PRCA) world standings for bull riding. The...

item.title: Counter-terrorism police investigate arson attack on former Jewish charity premises in northwest London
item.description: Counter Terrorism Policing London is leading the investigation into an arson attack that occurred on a business premises in Hendon, northwest London, on Friday night. The building was previously occup...

item.title: Weighing up the financial and lifestyle trade-offs of owning versus renting a coastal property
item.description: This advice column explores whether it makes more financial and lifestyle sense to build a coastal home or simply rent one when needed. The reader, who owns both an inner-city home and a debt-free blo...
